description_long: This object is a small, human-like doll with a simple, minimalistic design. The body is slender and symmetrical, with outstretched arms and legs, and a rounded head. The surface appears smooth and untextured, with no visible facial features, clothing details, or accessories. The entire figure is a uniform, solid white color, giving it a stylized and abstract appearance. The proportions are consistent with a generic toy doll, and the figure is likely made from lightweight plastic or resin. There are no visible joints or separable parts, suggesting it is a single molded piece.
description: A small, featureless white doll with a smooth, minimalistic body and outstretched limbs. The figure is solid, uniform, and abstract in appearance.
description_view_0: The doll is seen from the front, showing its symmetrical body, outstretched arms, and legs, with a rounded head and no facial features.
description_view_1: The doll is viewed from the left side, revealing the profile of the head, torso, and limbs, with the arms and legs extending outward.
description_view_2: The doll is seen from the back, displaying the smooth, featureless rear of the head, torso, and limbs.
description_view_3: The doll is viewed from the right side, mirroring the left profile with the same outstretched limbs and rounded head.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; the doll is entirely featureless and unadorned, with no garments or patterns present.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with both arms extended outward to the sides and both legs straight and slightly apart. The head is upright and aligned with the torso.
attribute_facial_expression: No facial features or expression are present; the face is completely blank and smooth.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is smooth and featureless.
